description_long: This is a large, armored, six-wheeled combat tactical vehicle with a robust, angular body and a dark green digital camouflage pattern. The vehicle features a prominent turret mounted on the roof, equipped with a visible barrel and several hatches and periscopes for observation. The exterior is covered in heavy armor plating, with reinforced panels and protective grilles over the wheel wells and side vents. The front and rear are both flat and heavily armored, with towing hooks and protective bars. The wheels are large, rugged, and designed for off-road mobility, featuring deep treads for enhanced traction. The vehicle appears to have multiple entry points, including side and roof hatches, and is built to transport personnel or equipment in hostile environments.
description: A heavily armored, six-wheeled combat vehicle with a turret and digital camouflage, designed for tactical operations in urban or rugged environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat, armored nose, towing hooks, and the central turret with visible barrel and observation devices.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the six large, rugged tires, side armor grilles, and the full profile of the turret and roof hatches.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, armored back, rear towing hooks, and protective side bars.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the six tires, side armor, and turret, with subtle differences in hatch placement.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One visible turret-mounted weapon on the roof, centrally located, with a single barrel.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular armor plating, reinforced panels on the sides, and protective grilles over wheel wells and vents.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Dark green digital camouflage with black and lighter green pixelated patches.
attribute_tire_type: Six large off-road tires with deep tread pattern, reinforced sidewalls.
